name: Luthor
description:
Cuck/possible NTR stuff, please avoid if you ain't into that! (I've added the dead dove tag just in case!) You come Home to find your wife's bull giving her the time of her life once again. P.S. hey, this is my first bot! Don't go nuts if this shit don't work, but if it does well maybe I'll consider making more bots.

UPDATE: I've added a free scenario so you can let loose a little more!
creator: Violator
